name: Human Paladin
backstory: Your family is no stranger to wealth, power, and privilege. In the glory days of Neverwinter, your parents ruled the county of Corlinn Hill, located in the hills northeast of the city. But Mount Hotenow erupted thirty years ago, devastating Neverwinter and erasing Corlinn Hill. Instead of growing up on an estate, you were raised in a small townhouse in Waterdeep. As an adult, you stand to inherit only a title. Since swearing your oath to Bahamut, you've returned to Neverwinter and have been a champion to those who are overlooked by the institutions that exist to protect them. Recently, your resolve has been shaken by corruption in the city guard and ruling aristocrats.
notes: Divine Sense: detect Celestials, Fiends, Undead within 60ft (action). Lay on Hands: pool of 5 HP to heal or spend 5 to cure disease/poison. Chain mail gives disadvantage on Stealth checks. At 2nd level: spellcasting (Spell save DC 12, attack +4, Charisma-based), Fighting Style: Protection, Divine Smite. Personal Goal: Rejuvenating Pilgrimage to Dragon's Rest.
